spec.description: Project for measuring energy consumption with ESP32 board and watt meter PZEM-004T AC-100A

spec.query:
from(bucket: "EnergyConsumption")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pzem_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "voltage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "pzem004t")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "EnergyConsumption")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pzem_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "voltage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "pzem004t")
  |> drop(columns: ["device", "sensor"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "EnergyConsumption")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pzem_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pf")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "pzem004t")
  |> drop(columns: ["device", "sensor"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "EnergyConsumption")
  |> range(start: today())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pzem_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "energy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "pzem004t")
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "EnergyConsumption")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pzem_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "energy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "pzem004t")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)

from(bucket: "EnergyConsumption")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pzem_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "energy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "pzem004t")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)

from(bucket: "EnergyConsumption")
  |> range(start: -7d, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pzem_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "energy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "pzem004t")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      _value: r._value * 30.4375,
      _field: "monthly_energy_estimate"
  }))

from(bucket: "EnergyConsumption")
  |> range(start: today())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pzem_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "energy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "pzem004t")
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * float(v: "${price_kwh}") }))

from(bucket: "EnergyConsumption")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pzem_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "energy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "pzem004t")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * float(v: "${price_kwh}") }))

from(bucket: "EnergyConsumption")
  |> range(start: today())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pzem_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "pzem004t")
  |> max()

from(bucket: "EnergyConsumption")
  |> range(start: today())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pzem_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "pzem004t")
  |> mean()

from(bucket: "EnergyConsumption")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pzem_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "pzem004t")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "EnergyConsumption")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pzem_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "pzem004t")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      _value: float(v: uint(v: now()) - uint(v: r._time)) / 1000000000.0,
      _field: "data_age_seconds"
  }))

from(bucket: "EnergyConsumption")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pzem_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "voltage" or r._field == "current")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "pzem004t")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _value: r.voltage * r.current,
      _field: "Apparent Power"
  }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "EnergyConsumption")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pzem_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "voltage" or r._field == "current" or r._field == "power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "pzem004t")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.voltage and exists r.current and exists r.power)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _value: if r.voltage * r.current == 0.0 then 0.0 else r.power / (r.voltage * r.current),
      _field: "Calculated PF"
  }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

spec.title: Voltage Min/Max
spec.description: Tracks the lowest and highest voltage values over time to show mains stability and voltage dips or spikes.

spec.query:
base =
  from(bucket: "EnergyConsumption")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pzem_data")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "voltage")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "esp32")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "pzem004t")

minVoltage =
  base
    |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: min, createEmpty: false)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        _time: r._time,
        _value: r._value,
        _field: "Voltage Min"
    }))

maxVoltage =
  base
    |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        _time: r._time,
        _value: r._value,
        _field: "Voltage Max"
    }))

union(tables: [minVoltage, maxVoltage])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
